question: What two distinct capabilities do Quantum 'Reality-Shapers' possess?

answers.original: Quantum 'Reality-Shapers' can manipulate Probability-Fields to alter the likelihood of events and generate Dimension-Rifts that create temporary portals between parallel realities.
answers.perturbed: Quantum 'Reality-Shapers' possess the capabilities of governing the strange laws of their realm and working with ethereal materials to craft Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors'.

ops.description: Nebula-Yarn is spun from the raw material of stellar nurseries.
Phantasmal artisans work with ethereal materials to craft Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors'.

entities.name: Quantum 'Reality-Shapers'
entities.description: Quantum 'Reality-Shapers' are individuals capable of manipulating 'Probability-Fields' and generating 'Dimension-Rifts'.

entities.name: Quantum Physics
entities.description: Quantum Physics governs the strange laws of the realm where Quantum 'Reality-Shapers' exist.
